headline: RealReal Leadership Overhaul Puts Focus On Execution And Investor Expectations
summary: RealReal (NasdaqGS:REAL) has appointed Jennifer McKeehan to its Board of Directors. The company has also added Tiffany Stevenson as Chief People Officer and Tom Hanrahan as Chief Revenue Officer. The new leaders bring experience from companies including Fanatics, Walmart, Peloton, Weight Watchers and Square. RealReal is drawing fresh attention after a major leadership refresh that brings new oversight to both people and revenue functions. The appointments come with the share price at $8.64...
